failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG DES at lower temperatures or local concentration gradients leading to salt precipitation
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-traced feed lines and a pre-heating coil before the reactor zone

failure_modes.cause: Local hotspots at 120°C due to low Re (119) and poor radial heat transfer in 0.75mm PFA tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Use a high-thermal-conductivity oil bath and monitor outlet temperature for degradation products

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES causing erratic pressure spikes or seal wear in the Back Pressure Regulator
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pressure transducer immediately upstream of the BPR to detect oscillations

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage or seal failure leads to immediate loss of pressure and solvent flashing
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (4 hours) with pure DES at 120°C to monitor for pressure drift or precipitation
Step-wise temperature ramp (80°C to 140°C) to determine the onset of DES thermal decomposition
Pressure drop verification across the 19m PFA coil using the actual DES mixture to validate the 1.711 bar estimate
